Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Kiuran]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 2''' — Kiuran is a Hound and a rat-like man with a thin beard and dark, beady eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 2''' — Kiuran wears smooth eggshell armor of the Abidan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 2''' — Kiuran is a heavenly messenger.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 2''' — Kiuran claims to see the future/outcomes long ago.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 11''' — Kiuran is of the Hounds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Kiuran the Hound is contained within a blue bubble of the Way.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Kiuran is known as Kiuran the Hound.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Yerin spoke to Kiuran about burying a dragon.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 31''' — Kiuran is a one-star Titan and a member of the Hounds.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
